category_sources: Official repository README describes jid as Json Incremental Digger for interactive JSON drill-down.
source_facts.description says jid is a JSON incremental digger.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jid; official repository uses lowercase jid.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; README is the main official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes interactive JSON drill-down using filtering queries and JMESPath-style usage.
